title: One Piece Devil Fruits | Gapple CIT
description: This resource pack replaces Enchanted/Golden Apples with different Devil Fruits from One Piece using custom names with CIT.
body:
Ever wanted your snacks to grant you powers… like a **Devil Fruit**?
This resource pack transforms **Enchanted/Golden Apples** into Devil Fruits from _One Piece_ using CIT (Custom Item Textures).

Just rename a egapple or a gapple in an anvil to match one of the fruit names shown in the menu below, and watch it transform into the corresponding Devil Fruit!

No need to sail the Grand Line when your powers are only an anvil away.

Fruit artwork by **GoneGozzle.exe** [[Instagram]](https://www.instagram.com/gonegozzle.exe/)

![Menu showing each fruit you can have based on the name you give the totem in an anvil. the quoted names are Japanese alternatives.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6388b901603f68b41ac5cc943c8793ea6875b9e.jpeg)
